mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.username as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM post_comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.parent_id = 0 AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.like_count DESC, c.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND status = 1
SELECT c.*, u.username as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM post_comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.create_time ASC

SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.reply_to_user_id, c.reply_to_user_name, c.content, c.like_count, c.status, c.create_time, u.username as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar, p.title as post_title, p.content as post_content, p.create_time as post_create_time, pu.username as post_author_name, pu.avatar as post_author_avatar FROM post_comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN post p ON c.post_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user pu ON p.user_id = pu.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT c.*, u.username as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM post_comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_comment (post_id, user_id, parent_id, reply_to_user_id, reply_to_user_name, content) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{parentId}, #{replyToUserId}, #{replyToUserName}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE post_comment SET like_count = like_count + #{delta} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_comment WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE post_comment SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_comment WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND status = 1
